name: LAMAR ADVERTISING CO/NEW
summary: Lamar Advertising Company is one of the largest outdoor advertising companies in the United States, operating under the Lamar name since 1902. The company manages billboard, logo, and transit advertising segments, renting space on approximately 159,300 billboards (including 5,500 digital), 144,400 logo signs, and 40,600 transit displays across 45 states and Canada. It offers integrated services including ad copy production, placement, and maintenance, serving primarily local advertisers who constitute approximately 79% of outdoor net revenues.
